CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Margaret Del Coto, CSR #8493. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2003 Continued To May-13-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Frank Agnost appearing for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 5/13/2003 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Patty Lee Hubble, CSR# 3058. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Apr-15-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. The order to show cause is reset for a CRC 225 order to show cause 4/15/03 10:00AM. Proceedings reported by Beldon Yee. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2002 Continued To Jan-29-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

For Relief From Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-14-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's Motion for Relief from Sanctions issued on 10/8/2002 to Arthur R. Greenberg, Esq., in the amount of $200.00 is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Court signed proposed order. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Morales. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon. (212)
